creator: tpearson@raptorengineering.com
text:
After further investigation, the boot process changed somewhat with the newer kernels setting CONFIG_LOCK_DOWN_KERNEL_FORCE_INTEGRITY, meaning kexec_file_load() is used instead of kexec_load().  This is obviously something we want to support for security reasons, but it appears this also broke the FreeBSD boot process.

Adding Brandon on CC...thoughts welcome!
